Bio

Welcome! I am currently an undergraduate student in Robotics Engineering at Nanjing Institute of Technology (NJIT), and also a research assistant in Fast Lab, Zhejiang University (ZJU).

My research interests are perception and motion planning for mobile robots, especially for perception involving sensor-fusion and motion planning in SE(3).

The research I appreciate is those trying to solve practical problems with elegant solutions. I am always willing to explore exciting technologies in Robotics field and use what I learned to help others. My dream is to build a robot that can help people improve their life!

Publications

FAST-Dynamic-Vision: Detection and Tracking Dynamic Objects with Event and Depth Sensing.

Botao He*, Haojia Li*, Siyuan Wu, Dong Wang, Zhiwei Zhang, Qianli Dong, Chao Xu, and Fei Gao

IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2021), under review.

Paper Video Code

Whole-Body Real-Time Motion Planning for Multicopters

Shaohui Yang, Botao He, Zhepei Wang, Chao Xu, and Fei Gao

IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2021)

Paper Video

Projects

  • Current Projects
  • Past
Event-based Perception
Perception involving depth and event sensing, with low latency and high precision.
Whole-body Motion Planning for Multicopters
A full-body motion planning framework, state-of-art in terms of computation time and memory usage.
Light-weight Quadruped Robot
A light-weight quadruped designed and built in fresh year.
-
Event-based Perception
Perception involving depth and event sensing, with low latency and high precision.
Whole-body Motion Planning for Multicopters
A full-body motion planning framework, state-of-art in terms of computation time and memory usage.
Light-weight Quadruped Robot
A light-weight quadruped designed and built in fresh year.
UAV Natural Gas Pipeline Inspection
An autonumous inspection UAV system. It is feasible of our system to save people from inspecting in dangerous places like cliffs!
Electromagnetic Throw System
A throw system that is able to automunously find the target, estimate target's depth and calculate parabola.
Challenge Arena Fighting
An autonomous robot with ability to move over terrains, detect and attack the opponent autonomously.

Experiences

  • Zhejiang University 2019 - now
    Research Assistant
    FAST (Field Autonomous System & compuTing) Lab. Advised by Prof. Fei Gao.
  • Nanjing Institute of Technology 2018 - now
    Undergraduate
    Major in Robot Engineering.
